justification: The diff correctly migrates javax to jakarta, updates Spring Boot to 3.x (Java 21 compatible), and modernizes annotations (@GetMapping, @PostMapping) and instanceof patterns. However, it retains JUnit 4 (junit:junit) instead of migrating to JUnit 5 (junit-jupiter), and the pom.xml adds unnecessary dependencyManagement for jstl 1.2 which is already managed by Spring Boot 3.3.13.
